latin: Parvus eques in regnum derelictum descendit. Hallownestum olim magnum fuerat, nunc autem silentium et tenebrae regnabant. infectio antiqua sub terra dormiebat.

questions.prompt: What lies sleeping beneath the ground?

translation: A small knight descended into an abandoned kingdom. Hallownest had once been great, but now silence and darkness reigned. An ancient infection slept beneath the earth.
